raw: Please Note: The Museum of Russian Icons is now the Icon Museum and Study Center. Type of pass: Returnable, must be picked up from the library the day before or the day of your reservation date. Pricing: Free general admission for up to 6 people. Additional instructions: -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount. THIS PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO THE MORSE INSTITUTE LIBRARY BY 9:30AM THE DAY AFTER YOUR RESERVATION. OVERDUE FINES ARE $3/DAY. Passes can be returned at the circulation desk or the outside book drops.
